objective: Design and later prove five distinct engine-neutral progression lanes for knowledge, access, relationship, construction and power without collapsing them into a universal economy.
next_action: Report accepted GP2 readiness, then freeze failing tests from the exact design receipt before any source implementation.

research_gate: GP0 and GP1 are structurally complete. The read-only GP2 design receipt is accepted and semantics are frozen for red tests; source implementation remains paused until the readiness result is reported.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized GP2 design intake and readiness only. No source implementation, universal currency, positive cycle, dominant conversion, grind, graphics, runtime, persistence, network, monetization, Greenfield dependency, C3B authority, GP3 or GP4.
context_health: GP1 passed focused, regression, workspace, independent and registered complete verification. GP2 is the unique executing item; its accepted design and readiness freeze exact typed progression semantics before source implementation.

macro_findings: Mind Warp remains the first product customer and GP2 follows the structurally complete GP0-GP1 path.
Progress must unlock named decisions rather than merely accelerate repetition.
GP3 encounter grammar, runtime, Companion and Greenfield authority remain separate.
micro_findings: Durable progression must consume a replay-validated terminal BaseLoopStateV1 and bind its canonical digest.
Only explicit per-session and per-outcome rules may create progression; caller-supplied opportunity costs and arbitrary tool IDs have no durable authority.
Power grants require an exact allowlisted prepared tool and successful allowlisted outcome; combat diversion grants nothing.
The accepted design freezes five distinct lane records, explicit per-session and per-outcome rules, typed receipts, guarded flows, three strategies and the S1 capability allowlist.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: GP2 design intake is typed and engine-neutral with no admitted visual asset.

tiers_completed.result: GP2 recovery-map scope, GP1 input authority and the provisional adversarial matrix define one bounded design problem.
The accepted read-only receipt freezes five distinct record families, exact input and receipt authority, guarded flow rules, S1 capability rules and deterministic strategy proof obligations.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: Implementation could drift from the frozen record families or fail to expose a dominance or conversion exploit in the deterministic matrix.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: Determine whether the frozen model rejects fabricated progress, positive cycles and dominant strategies under exact replay.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: One red-test matrix and the smallest pure reducer extension after readiness reporting.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No source implementation or GP3/runtime/Greenfield/C3B authority enters design intake.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Stop if the design uses a universal currency, cannot bind exact GP1 outcome evidence, or admits a non-negative conversion cycle.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: Focused GP2, retained GP1 and GP0, workspace, independent and one registered complete Forge gate.

exit_criteria.label: Knowledge, access, relationship, construction and power remain typed and non-aliasing.
Every source, sink, reset, conversion and exploit boundary is explicit and replay-bound.
Deterministic strategy simulations reject universal resources, positive cycles and a dominant conversion path.
GP2 adds no runtime, universal currency, grind, Greenfield, C3B, GP3 or GP4 authority.

unresolved_risks: lane types could become cosmetic wrappers over one fungible value
conversion or reset edges could duplicate progress or create a positive cycle
caller-supplied opportunity costs or tool text could fabricate durable progression
one strategy could dominate every named decision over the simulated horizon
evidence_requirements: review the read-only GP2 design receipt before freezing semantics
bind all durable changes to a canonical digest of replay-validated terminal GP1 state
enumerate explicit fixture-owned per-session and per-outcome progression rules
prove strategy viability and reject positive conversion cycles and dominant paths
retain GP3 runtime Greenfield C3B grind network and monetization exclusions
verification_plan: adjudicate the read-only design receipt against the readiness questions and hostile matrix
revise readiness with exact typed semantics and simulation horizons
write failing progression and exploit tests before source implementation
run focused GP2, retained GP1 and GP0, workspace, independent and one registered complete gate
resume_after: After the design receipt is reviewed, report revised GP2 readiness before any source implementation.
evidence: Owner authorized the game-first GP1-to-GP2 transition and design-first progression scope.
GP1 complete registered run run-26b8424e488b4d838eb51cc928675224 passed in 402857 ms.
The canonical full-gate launcher fixture passes and direct production verify.ps1 now rejects before expensive work.
